anonSigninBody: Sign in to see AI suggestions hanging beside this guideline, rate their usefulness, and follow the full literature trail (PMID, evidence strength).
gateTitle: We've prepared an early draft — show it to your doctor.
gateBody: There is no agreed clinical guideline for {{disease}} yet. We assembled an early draft from the literature, but it is not a guideline — so we don't show it as advice. The safest path is to hand it to a doctor, who can review it in our system and tell you what applies to your child.
gateReadReviewed: A clinician has reviewed this draft — still a suggestion, not an approved guideline.
gateNoReadYet: No clinician has read this draft yet.
sendDoctorBody: The condensed guideline plus the original sources — ready to print or send. If a doctor signs in, they also see the AI suggestions and the full literature trail.
parentFooter: Condensed by us from the source documents above · last revised {{date}}. Author and reviewer names are in the original documents.
disclaimerAddition: This is a proposed addition to the guideline
disclaimerModification: This is a proposed change to the current guideline
ratingSignalTail: — it does not modify the official text.
placementCaptionAddition: Placement preview — where this addition lands in the document.
placementCaptionModification: The change shown as a unified diff against the source document.
visibleOnlyClinicians: Visible only to other clinicians and researchers
regenerateHint: Creates a new, explicitly versioned draft — never a silent overwrite.
claimNotFoundBody: This statement is no longer in the synthesis.
provenanceLead: On the left — the claim from the synthesis. On the right — the literature it rests on. Each links to its original on PubMed. (Paraphrased source quotes arrive with the backend.)
citedInSupport: Cited in support of this claim.
noReferencesBody: This claim has no literature basis mapped yet.
noBaselinePrefix: No AI baseline has been assembled for this disease yet. For now,
unverifiedBannerTitle: You can read everything — your signal is held for now.
unverifiedBannerBody: Your account is awaiting verification (ORCID + institution). Once verified, your ratings will count toward the weighted signal that other clinicians see.
modeFullAiTitle: The fully AI-built version lands in a later slice.
suggBeyondDocsTail: — listed separately, at the end. The synthesis below stays a faithful summary of the sources.
suggzoneLeadPart2: It is the live layer over the official sources: new pointers from fresher literature, or proposed changes to a specific recommendation
suggzoneLeadPart3: not to manage a patient from. Your rating is a signal for the next clinician; it does not publish or change the synthesis.
noAiSuggestionsBody: The literature monitor runs in the background; candidates from new evidence appear here when they are worth a look.
bibTipSuffix: suggestions are the tip of a much larger analyzed corpus
bibTipPapersScored: papers scored on the latest run
bibTipRejectedSuffix: , including papers the engine rejected and why.
bibNoSuggestions: See every paper the engine considered on the latest run — including rejections with the AI's one-line reason.
sourceShelfTitleParent: What this summary is based on
sourceShelfTitleDefault: Source shelf — there is no single document
sourceShelfLeadParent: The summary above combines these papers. If you prefer, read straight from the source — each opens its original.
sourceShelfLeadDefault: There is rarely a single “guideline.” This is a curated set of real documents; the synthesis summarizes them together, and every claim links to its source.
provRowBasisTitle: Basis: {{label}} · {{loc}} — see where this comes from
faithfulSafeQuestion: Is this summary faithful and safe?
flagNotePlaceholder: What's wrong? e.g. “lost a warning”, “misleading for a parent”, “inconsistent with Gun 2024”…
reportSentMessage: Thanks — your report reaches QA before the next reader.
fullCitationNote: Full citation metadata lands with the backend.
noRatingsYet: No ratings yet — be the first to leave a signal.
baselineNoGuidelineTitle: There is no agreed guideline for {{disease}}.
baselineDisclaimerPart2: — not a guideline. Experts can author here, not only review. Assembled from {{builtFrom}}.
